title: huperzia buesii
intro: Huperzia buesii, also known as a species of liverwort, is a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Huperziaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit acetylcholinesterase, an enzyme that breaks down the neurotransmitter acetylcholine, which plays a key role in memory and cognitive function. The health benefits of Huperzia buesii include potential improvements in memory, cognitive function, and neuroprotection, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Huperzia buesii can be prepared as a herbal supplement, typically in capsule or tablet form, or as an extract used in traditional medicine.
